required_preferences.fact: Strictly prohibits any device use after 8pm and keeps all electronics fully outside the bedroom—now uses a CPAP machine and follows a rigid wind-down routine for sleep hygiene

supersedes.fact: Limits personal screen time to under one hour after 8pm—never brings devices into the bedroom

required_preferences.fact: Suspends summer date nights with his spouse due to her extended sabbatical in Europe—maintains regular video calls instead

supersedes.fact: Sets summer date nights with his spouse when their routines diverge—never cancels unless absolutely necessary

required_preferences.fact: Adjusts household meal planning to accommodate low-mobility-friendly, heart-healthy options for his mother
Prepares evening herbal tea for his mother and joins her for quiet conversation as part of her recovery routine
Prepares all weekday dinners solo for his daughters—never relies on takeout while spouse is away
Conducts daily dry-run presentations to key project staff for two weeks prior to funder evaluation—never rehearses solo for high-stakes external reviews

persona: A mid-career nonprofit director managing grant agreements and partnerships
